title: Glory in suffering; justice at revelation
summary_text: Grace peace from God Father and Lord Jesus Christ. Thanks for faith love patience in persecution—evidence righteous judgment of God; counted worthy of Kingdom. God repays tribulation to afflicters; rest with Paul when Christ revealed from heaven with angels in flaming fire.
key_points: We ourselves boast about you in the assemblies of God for your perseverance and faith in all your persecutions.
This is an obvious sign of the righteous judgment of God.
It is a righteous thing with God to repay affliction to those who afflict you.
when the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven with his mighty angels in flaming fire.
evidence_phrases: counted worthy of the Kingdom of God
repay affliction to those who afflict you
the Lord Jesus is revealed from heaven

title: Man of lawlessness; stand firm
summary_text: Day of Christ not yet—apostasy first, man of lawlessness revealed, son of destruction—God restrains till taken away. Strong delusion for refusing love of truth. Stand firm traditions; comfort hearts establish good work.
key_points: Let no one deceive you in any way. For it will not be, unless the departure comes first.
the man of sin is revealed, the son of destruction.
until he is taken out of the way.
For this reason, God sends them a powerful delusion.
Stand firm, and hold the traditions which you were taught by us.
evidence_phrases: the man of sin is revealed
until he is taken out of the way
God sends them a powerful delusion
Stand firm, and hold the traditions

title: Pray; idle brethren; grace
summary_text: Pray we word may spread rapidly; Lord direct; from faithless wicked. Confidence in Lord doing and will do. If brother walks disorderly—note withdraw—not enemy admonish. Work eat own bread; be not weary well-doing. Peace; signature Paul; grace.
key_points: Finally, brothers, pray for us, that the word of the Lord may spread rapidly.
But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you.
Note that man, and have no company with him, that he may be ashamed.
If anyone is not willing to work, don’t let him eat.
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you all. Amen.
evidence_phrases: the word of the Lord may spread rapidly
If anyone is not willing to work
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ
